---
name: Translation Contribution
about: Submit or update a translation for PortPane
title: "[TRANSLATION] "
labels: translation, community
assignees: Computer-Tsu
---

## Language
Which language are you contributing? (e.g. German, French, Japanese)

**ISO 639-1 code:** (e.g. `de`, `fr`, `ja`)

## Translation Status
- [ ] New translation (language not yet in the repo)
- [ ] Update/correction to existing translation
- [ ] Complete translation of all strings
- [ ] Partial translation (describe what is covered below)

## Notes
Any cultural or terminology notes the maintainer should know.
For example: preferred term for "COM port" in your language.

## How to Contribute
See [TRANSLATING.md](../../TRANSLATING.md) for the full guide.
The strings file to translate is: `src/PortPane/Resources/Strings.resx`
Name your file: `Strings.{code}.resx` (e.g. `Strings.fr.resx`)
